name: MD ALIF ZIAD SARKAR
summary: Final-year Computer Science and Engineering student at American International University-Bangladesh with strong interest in software development and technology-based solutions. Experienced in developing academic projects including an e-commerce management system and involved in online business operations through Nirjhor Crafts. Possess strong analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills developed through tutoring and project work.

experience.title: Tutor
experience.description: Taught mathematics and science to students from classes 7–10 in Bangla medium and English version schools. Helped students improve understanding of academic subjects through structured lessons and problem-solving practice. Developed communication and teaching skills through regular interaction with students.

experience.title: Business Partner
experience.description: Involved in managing an online craft business operating through social media platforms. Assisted with product promotion, customer communication, and order coordination. Contributed to online business operations and digital marketing activities.
